signals.headline: XRP Reclassified as Commodity by SEC/CFTC | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Reclassified as Commodity by SEC/CFTC | YES | HIGH confidence**  
SEC and CFTC's March 17 ruling classified XRP as a commodity, confirmed by SEC Chairman Paul Atkins for regulatory implementation; Fidelity added XRP to its digital commodity index, with 7 spot ETFs holding $1B+ in assets and $120M recent inflows.[3]
